requirements.title: Enforce retention and erasure periods for personal data
requirements.description: Every system that stores personal data must be able to delete or anonymise it once the defined retention period ends (storage limitation).

requirements.title: Protect integrity and confidentiality of personal data
requirements.description: Personal data must be processed with technical and organisational measures ensuring integrity and confidentiality.
requirements.notes: Adjudiziert 2026-07-05 (Kappa 0,709 Mensch-vs-Regel). Entscheidung a: Halter + Maßnahme (Caddy/TLS).

requirements.title: Capture and manage a lawful basis (e.g. consent) for each processing activity
requirements.description: The system that manages user identity must record and enforce a lawful basis (consent, contract) for processing personal data.
requirements.notes: Adjudiziert 2026-07-05 (Kappa 0,709 Mensch-vs-Regel). Kein Consent-Management-System modelliert → Gap (leer).

requirements.title: Provide data subjects access to their personal data on request
requirements.description: Each system holding personal data must be able to retrieve and export that data for a subject-access request.
requirements.notes: Adjudiziert 2026-07-05 (Kappa 0,709 Mensch-vs-Regel). Alle pbD-Halter müssen Auskunft liefern können.

requirements.title: Erase a data subject’s personal data on request
requirements.description: Each system holding personal data must support deletion of an individual’s data without undue delay.
requirements.notes: Adjudiziert 2026-07-05 (Kappa 0,709 Mensch-vs-Regel). Alle pbD-Halter müssen löschen können.

requirements.title: Propagate erasure to downstream and replicated stores
requirements.description: An erasure request must reach all replicated / downstream stores that hold copies of the personal data.
requirements.notes: Adjudiziert 2026-07-05 (Kappa 0,709 Mensch-vs-Regel). Downstream/Weitergabe-Ziele (externe Verarbeiter/Hosting), NICHT Primärhalter — Prädikat auf gdpr.art28 korrigiert.

requirements.title: Bind external processors via a data-processing agreement (DPA)
requirements.description: Every third party that processes personal data on our behalf must be governed by a data-processing agreement.

requirements.title: Maintain a record of processing activities (ROPA)
requirements.description: A system or register must maintain the record of processing activities required by Art. 30.
requirements.notes: Adjudiziert 2026-07-05 (Kappa 0,709 Mensch-vs-Regel). Kein VVT-System modelliert → Gap (leer).

requirements.title: Encrypt personal data in transit and at rest
requirements.description: Personal data must be encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest; systems holding it must be covered by these measures.
requirements.notes: Adjudiziert 2026-07-05 (Kappa 0,709 Mensch-vs-Regel). Entscheidung a: alle pbD-Halter + Verschlüsselungs-/TLS-Maßnahme (Caddy).

requirements.title: Enforce authentication and access control on personal-data systems
requirements.description: Access to personal-data systems must be authenticated and authorised; security-relevant actions must be logged.
requirements.notes: Adjudiziert 2026-07-05 (Kappa 0,709 Mensch-vs-Regel). Entscheidung a: alle pbD-Halter (Auth-Maßnahme svc-auth bereits enthalten; Caddy=Transport, kein Access-Control).

requirements.title: Detect and notify a personal-data breach within 72 hours
requirements.description: A process/system must detect a personal-data breach and notify the supervisory authority within 72 hours.
requirements.notes: Adjudiziert 2026-07-05 (Kappa 0,709 Mensch-vs-Regel). Kein Incident-Response-System modelliert → Gap (leer).

requirements.title: Apply a transfer mechanism for third-country data transfers
requirements.description: Personal data sent to processors outside the EU/adequacy area must be covered by a valid transfer mechanism.
requirements.notes: Adjudiziert 2026-07-05 (Kappa 0,709 Mensch-vs-Regel). Nur US-Verarbeiter (Drittland); EU-VPS korrekt ausgeschlossen.
